description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a green lawn and a paved driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored stone or brick, and the roof is predominantly flat with a small section of sloped roofing over the carport. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior living spaces. The main entryway features a set of steps leading up to a modest porch area, partially sheltered by an overhang. The backyard includes a patio area, visible through sliding glass doors, providing outdoor living space.
description: A single-story stone-clad house with a flat roof, covered carport, asymmetrical windows, and a modest entry porch, set on a green lawn with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, large windows, and the open patio area at the back.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the covered carport, driveway, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, sliding glass doors, and the carport structure.
description_view_3: Side view with steps leading to the entry, visible stone facade, and a glimpse of the carport roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, modest porch, and overhang, no columns, simple door design
